consistency.theme: Consistent with the Bard class theme, emphasizing performance, charisma, and emotion as the source of magic.
consistency.mechanics: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spellcasting ability definitions. Charisma is correctly identified as the primary spellcasting attribute for Bards.

quality.clarity: The description is clear, explicitly stating Charisma as the spellcasting ability and providing the formulas for Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Modifier.
quality.completeness: Complete for a core class feature defining the spellcasting ability. The inclusion of the table enhances readability for the derived formulas.

mechanics.impact: Defines the core magical attribute for the Bard class, directly influencing spell effectiveness (DC and attack bonus).
mechanics.rules_adherence: Perfectly adheres to the established rules for the Bard class in D&D 5e.

formula_validation.name: Spell save DC
formula_validation.formula: 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier

formula_validation.name: Spell attack modifier
formula_validation.formula: your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier

analysis.archival_notes: This is the fundamental feature establishing the Bard's primary spellcasting attribute (Charisma) and providing the necessary calculation formulas. No inconsistencies or errors detected.
